flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Coahoma Community College rose 91% between 2002 and 2005 ($1.4k → $2.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Coahoma Community College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.0k → $3.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Coahoma Community College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.0k → $3.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Coahoma Community College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 1.1k).
